title: Ruby's mod relics
description: The Ruby Relic Mod: Fast, strategic gear. Pickaxe: Directional 3x3/vertical mining. Axe instantly fells trees. Armor grants Speed/high enchantability. Use the Armor Relay for instant full-set swapping via GUI. Requires NeoForge.
body:
# _Should the number of cross-platform downloads exceed 200, the modification will be completely redone in order to improve its quality. At present, we have 177._

# 💎 The Ruby Relic Mod

The Ruby Relic Mod introduces a complete set of Ruby gear, serving as a strategic, utility-focused alternative to Diamond. This mod emphasizes speed, versatility, and tactical readiness over raw power.

## Key Features:

    **Ruby Armor**: Offers slightly lower protection than Diamond, but boasts significantly higher Enchantability and passively grants the player a Speed status effect.

    **Directional Mining Pickaxe**: Features two distinct power modes: activate a 3×3 area clear when aiming horizontally at walls, or clear an entire vertical column when aiming straight down or up.

    **Lumberjack Axe**: Capable of felling an entire tree in a single go, automatically clearing the whole log column from the base upwards.

    **Armor Relay System**: A unique utility item that opens a custom interface, allowing players to instantly swap their currently worn armor set with a different set stored in the Relay's GUI.

_Prerequisite: Requires the NeoForge Mod Loader._
![every Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c123a11e61c4f7d6d0e303eda7ea80dd92d119c9.png)
